title: Analysts Agree Now's The Time To Buy These 10 Promising Stocks
text: Finding S&P 500 stocks that analysts agree on is rare. So when you see nearly unanimous agreement on some, that's quite a statement.

title: Jacobs (J) Wins 5.5-Year FCS Deal in Atlanta, Boosts Backlog
text: Jacobs (J) to manage the ESPLOST Capital Improvement Program in Atlanta for Fulton County Schools.

title: Jacobs to Manage Infrastructure Program for Fulton County Schools
text: Program to rebuild schools, improve energy efficiency, safety and technology systems DALLAS , March 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jacobs (NYSE:J) was selected by Fulton County Schools (FCS) in Atlanta, Georgia to manage the Education Special Purpose Local Option Sales Tax (ESPLOST) Capital Improvement Program. The current program will implement FCS' Capital Plan 2027, which includes $648 million in capital improvements for FCS facilities, safety and technology systems.

title: Why Is Jacobs Solutions (J) Down 0.3% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Jacobs Solutions (J) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Cirba Solutions & Jacobs form Strategic Alliance to Build Out Sustainable Battery Materials Facilities
text: Cirba Solutions partners with Jacobs to build out battery material facilities to process critical minerals from electric vehicles and expand EV battery recycling capacity in North America. CHARLOTTE, N.C.

title: Jacobs (J) to Aid LASAN & LADWP Advanced Water Reuse Facility
text: Jacobs (J) to help secure LA's long-term water supplies with a new advanced water purification facility.

title: Jacobs to Design and Build Advanced Water Reuse Facility in Los Angeles
text: Facility will treat and supply sustainable drinking water to region Water reuse solutions support company climate response strategic accelerator DALLAS , March 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jacobs (NYSE:J) has been selected by LA Sanitation and Environment (LASAN) and the Los Angeles Department of Water and Power (LADWP) as the progressive design-build contractor for the Donald C. Tillman Advanced Water Purification Facility (AWPF).
